footer.tagline: The free, private, offline wedding planner.

meta.title: WeddingOS — Free Wedding Planning App | Private & Offline
meta.description: Free, private wedding planning app. Budget, seating chart, guests, vendors, timeline, checklist. Works offline, zero ads, 100% private data.

hero.headline: Plan your wedding, simply
hero.subheadline: The free, 100% private, ad-free wedding planning app. Budget, guests, seating chart, vendors — all in one place.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: A complete app to organize every aspect of your wedding.

budget.title: Wedding Budget
budget.description: Track every expense, manage deposits and get a real-time view of your budget.

guests.title: Guest List & RSVP
guests.description: Manage your guests, track RSVPs and organize plus-ones.

seatingChart.title: Seating Chart
seatingChart.description: Create your seating chart with round or rectangular tables via drag and drop.

vendors.title: Vendors
vendors.description: Compare, contact and track your vendors: caterer, photographer, florist...

planning.title: Planning & Checklist
planning.description: Personalized timeline and checklist so you don't forget anything before the big day.

photos.title: Photo Sharing
photos.description: Share a private album with your guests via QR code, no account required.

publicPage.title: Wedding Website
publicPage.description: Create your personalized wedding web page to share details with your guests.

offline.title: 100% Offline
offline.description: Works without internet. Your data stays on your phone.

sync.title: Encrypted Sync
sync.description: Sync with your partner via AES-256 encryption. Nobody else has access.

tools.title: Free Tools
tools.subtitle: Use our online tools without creating an account.

seatingChart.title: Wedding Seating Chart
seatingChart.description: Create your seating chart online and export it as PDF.

budget.title: Budget Calculator
budget.description: Estimate and allocate your wedding budget by category.

timeline.title: Day-of Timeline
timeline.description: Build your wedding day schedule and print it.

privacy.title: Your privacy, our priority
privacy.subtitle: WeddingOS was designed from the ground up to respect your privacy.

offline.title: Offline-first
offline.description: All your data is stored on your device. No server reads it.

noAds.title: Zero ads
noAds.description: No tracking, no ads, no monetization of your personal data.

encrypted.title: End-to-end encryption
encrypted.description: Optional sync uses AES-256-GCM. Only you and your partner can read the data.

free.title: Free forever
free.description: No subscription, no in-app purchases. The app is and will remain free.

download.title: Ready to plan your wedding?
download.subtitle: Available on iOS, Android and web.

meta.title: Free Wedding Seating Chart Maker | WeddingOS
meta.description: Create your wedding seating chart easily. Drag and drop, round and rectangular tables, PDF export. Free tool included in the WeddingOS wedding planning app.

hero.headline: Wedding Seating Chart
hero.subheadline: Organize your wedding seating chart easily with our interactive tool. Create, adjust and print your table layout in minutes.

dragDrop.title: Intuitive drag and drop
dragDrop.description: Move guests from table to table with a simple drag and drop. Fast and visual.

shapes.title: Round & rectangular tables
shapes.description: Choose the shape of each table to match your reception venue.

capacity.title: Capacity management
capacity.description: Set the number of seats per table and instantly see available spots.

groups.title: Guest groups
groups.description: Automatically group families and friends to simplify seating.

export.title: Export & print
export.description: Export your seating chart as PDF to print or share with your caterer.

realtime.title: Real-time sync
realtime.description: Share and edit the seating chart with your partner simultaneously.

toolCta.title: Try the free seating chart tool
toolCta.description: Create your seating chart online without creating an account.

appCta.title: Full seating chart in the app
appCta.description: The mobile app offers all features: drag and drop, sync with your guest list, PDF export and more.

meta.title: Free Wedding Budget Calculator & Planner | WeddingOS
meta.description: Plan and track your wedding budget. Category breakdown, deposit tracking, remaining balances. Free calculator and complete mobile app.

hero.headline: Wedding Budget Planner
hero.subheadline: Plan every euro of your wedding budget. Track expenses by category, manage deposits and visualize your balances in real time.

features.title: Manage your wedding budget with peace of mind

categories.title: Customizable categories
categories.description: Allocate your budget across venue, catering, photographer, dress, decoration and more.

tracking.title: Expense tracking
tracking.description: Record every expense, deposit paid and remaining balance per vendor.

realtime.title: Real-time overview
realtime.description: Instantly see your total, spent and remaining budget.

vendors.title: Linked to vendors
vendors.description: Expenses are automatically linked to your vendors for complete tracking.

export.title: Excel & PDF export
export.description: Export your budget spreadsheet as PDF or CSV to share with your family.

offline.title: Offline
offline.description: Your budget is always accessible, even without an internet connection.

toolCta.title: Free wedding budget calculator
toolCta.description: Estimate the ideal budget breakdown based on your guest count.

appCta.title: Complete tracking in the app
appCta.description: The mobile app offers real-time tracking, payment history and sync with your vendors.

meta.title: Free & Private Wedding Photo Sharing App | WeddingOS
meta.description: Share a private photo album with your guests via QR code. No account required for guests. Photos hosted on your server. Free wedding photo app.

hero.headline: Wedding Photo Sharing
hero.subheadline: Create a private photo album for your wedding. Your guests scan a QR code and can add and view photos — without creating an account.

qrCode.title: QR code access
qrCode.description: Display the QR code at the ceremony. Guests access the album instantly, no app to install.

private.title: 100% private album
private.description: Your album is only visible to people who have the link or QR code.

guestUpload.title: Guest uploads
guestUpload.description: Your guests can share their own photos directly into the album.

noAccount.title: No account for guests
noAccount.description: No sign-up required to view or share photos. Just a QR code.

noCloud.title: Your photos stay yours
noCloud.description: Photos are hosted on your own sync server, not on third-party servers.

download.title: Bulk download
download.description: Download all event photos in one click after the wedding.

appCta.title: Create your wedding photo album
appCta.description: Available on iOS, Android and web. Free, no subscription.

appCta.title: Need more features?
appCta.description: The full WeddingOS app offers all these features and much more, for free.

meta.title: Free Online Wedding Seating Chart Maker | WeddingOS
meta.description: Create your wedding seating chart for free online. Add your tables and guests, visualize the result and export as PDF. No account required.

seatingChart.title: Wedding Seating Chart Maker
seatingChart.subtitle: Create your seating chart for free. Add tables, assign guests, export as PDF.
seatingChart.noTables: No tables — start by adding one.
seatingChart.noGuests: No guests — add guests to assign them to tables.

meta.title: Free Wedding Budget Calculator | WeddingOS
meta.description: Estimate and allocate your wedding budget by category. Free interactive calculator. Download your estimate as PDF.

budgetCalculator.title: Wedding Budget Calculator
budgetCalculator.subtitle: Enter your total budget and discover the recommended breakdown by category.
budgetCalculator.adjust: Adjust percentages according to your priorities

meta.title: Free Wedding Day-of Timeline Builder | WeddingOS
meta.description: Create your wedding day schedule. Add, reorder and print your day-of timeline. Free wedding planning timeline template.

timeline.title: Wedding Day-of Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Build your wedding day schedule step by step. Export as PDF to distribute.
timeline.noEvents: No events — start with the template or add an event.
